HGSS.363.0000:
Where are you off to with Pokémon?\f
The Pokémon League?\f
Are your Pokémon loyal enough for
you to win?\f
Let me see...\f
HGSS.363.0001:
Ah! Your Pokémon trusts you
very much.\f
It’s nice to see a good Trainer.\f
Here. A gift for your journey.\f
HGSS.363.0002:
TM37 happens to be Sandstorm.\f
It’s a move that inflicts damage on
both your and your foe’s Pokémon.\f
However, some Pokémon, such as Rock-
and Ground- and Steel-type\r
Pokémon, take no damage.\f
There are other ways to avoid taking
damage. I’ll let you figure it out.
HGSS.363.0003:
If it doesn’t come to trust you some
more, it could be tough going.\f
Trust is the tie that binds Pokémon
and Trainers.
